message:
feat(bubbles): Add Model::update tests for Progress and TextInput

- Add comprehensive Model::update tests for Progress component
  - test_model_update_handles_frame_msg
  - test_model_update_ignores_wrong_id
  - test_model_update_ignores_wrong_tag
  - test_progress_satisfies_model_bounds
- Add comprehensive Model::update tests for TextInput component
  - test_model_update_handles_paste_msg
  - test_model_update_unfocused_ignores_input
  - test_model_update_handles_key_input
  - test_textinput_satisfies_model_bounds
- Add placeholder benchmark files to fix cargo build

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
